hero.title: Master Modern Frontend Development with Angular
hero.text: Learn how to build fast, accessible, and production-ready web applications with Angular, TypeScript, and modern UI engineering practices. Create polished interfaces, reusable components, and real-world projects that strengthen both your skills and your portfolio.
hero.imageAlt: Frontend developer building a modern Angular application

courseFormats.heading: Frontend Learning Paths
courseFormats.subheading: Choose a learning path that matches your current level, your schedule, and the type of frontend developer you want to become.

formats.title: Angular Foundations
features: Core HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and TypeScript concepts
Angular components, templates, directives, and data binding
Hands-on exercises in every module
Responsive layouts with modern CSS techniques
Debugging basics and clean code habits
Best for beginners building a strong frontend base

formats.title: Advanced Angular Engineering
features: Routing, guards, forms, and HTTP communication
Component architecture and reusable UI patterns
RxJS, reactive thinking, and async data handling
State management and scalable project structure
Performance optimization and maintainability best practices
Best for developers who want to build real production apps

formats.title: UI/UX with Angular
features: Design systems and consistent component libraries
Accessible interfaces and responsive user experiences
UI refactoring sessions based on real project scenarios
Visual hierarchy, spacing, and frontend polish
Bridging design decisions with Angular implementation
Best for developers who want strong design-aware frontend skills

priceOffers.heading: Frontend Plans
priceOffers.subheading: Pick the plan that matches how deep you want to go into Angular, frontend architecture, and practical project work.

offers.title: Starter Frontend
features: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript essentials
Introduction to Angular components and templates
Basic TypeScript for frontend development
Structured exercises and guided mini-projects
Community support
Access to recorded lessons and starter materials

offers.title: Angular Pro
features: Complete Angular curriculum from fundamentals to advanced topics
Routing, reactive forms, API integration, and reusable architecture
Live coding sessions and practical frontend challenges
Code reviews and mentor feedback
Access to all guided frontend projects
Certificate of completion for your portfolio

offers.title: UI/UX & Angular Expert
features: Design-focused Angular projects with production-style workflows
Advanced UI composition and scalable component systems
Accessibility, responsiveness, and interface polish
Mentorship from senior frontend engineers
Portfolio reviews and project feedback sessions
Career-oriented support for frontend job readiness

teachers.name: Anna Müller
teachers.title: Lead Angular Engineer
teachers.description: Anna specializes in Angular, TypeScript, and scalable frontend architecture. She helps students understand how to write clean, maintainable, and testable code that reflects real engineering standards.

teachers.name: David Rossi
teachers.title: UI/UX & Frontend Specialist
teachers.description: David combines interface design and frontend development to help students build polished, accessible, and user-focused applications with Angular and modern CSS workflows.
teachers.imageAlt: David Rossi, UI and frontend specialist

teachers.name: Elena Novak
teachers.title: Frontend Mentor
teachers.description: Elena guides students through real project scenarios, pair programming, and code review sessions so they can grow from learning syntax to thinking like confident frontend developers.
